```text
Subject: Interview Invitation - Software Engineer at Example Corp

Dear John Doe,

Thank you for your interest in the Software Engineer position at Example Corp. We were impressed with your resume and would like to invite you to an interview to learn more about your skills and experience.

The interview is scheduled for:

Date: [Insert Date]
Time: [Insert Time]
Duration: 60 minutes
Location: [Insert Location - e.g., Zoom Meeting Link or Example Corp Office]
Interviewer(s): [Insert Interviewer Names and Titles]

Please confirm your availability at your earliest convenience. If the proposed time does not work for you, please let me know and we'll find an alternative.

We look forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Example Corp]

---

Subject: Following Up - Software Engineer Interview at Example Corp

Dear John Doe,

I hope this email finds you well.

I'm writing to follow up on your interview for the Software Engineer position at Example Corp on [Date of Interview].

We appreciate you taking the time to speak with us. The interview team was very impressed with your background and experience.

We are currently in the process of evaluating all candidates and will be in touch with an update on your application status by [Date].

In the meantime, if you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Thank you again for your interest in Example Corp.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Example Corp]
```
